arts.ttl: Arda Turan: Simeone, Barcelona and his coaching revolution in Turkey
arts.sum: It is late night at Eyupspor's impressive training facility and Arda Turan is working out how to mastermind another victory for his team, the surprise package in Turkey. "It is in these moments I understand Diego Simeone even better," he tells Sky Sports.

arts.ttl: 5 talking points as Wales tackle Turkey test with Nations League status at stake
arts.sum: The Dragons trail the group leaders by two points heading into the final round of fixtures.

arts.ttl: The Wales coach who means 'everything' to Bellamy
arts.sum: Wales boss Craig Bellamy explains how his assistant coach, ex-Manchester City analyst Piet Cremers, has influenced "everything" he does.

arts.ttl: Swansea City star Joe Allen makes admission over his future after Wales return
arts.sum: The veteran admits he's started to think about what may come next when he's hung up his boots

arts.ttl: Joe Allen not surprised by Wales team-mate Harry Wilson’s rise
arts.sum: The Fulham forward has been in a rich vein of scoring form for club and country.
